customer_overview.title: Case & Customer Overview
items: Identity verified: passport + secondary government ID, biometric match on file
Occupation: former deputy minister of transport (2016-2021); current private investor

source_of_funds.title: Source of Funds (SoF)
items: Inbound funding of USD 4.2m from disclosed brokerage liquidation
Bank statements corroborate liquidation proceeds over 90 days

source_of_wealth.title: Source of Wealth (SoW)
items: Wealth attributed to a 2011 sale of a logistics business (independently documented)
Public filings and audited accounts corroborate sale proceeds

ownership_control.title: Ownership & Control (UBO)
items: Layered holding via one intermediate holding company; UBO traced to customer at 100%
No nominee arrangement identified; control confirmed

geography_exposure.title: Geographic Exposure
items: Residence and one funding nexus in a FATF-listed higher-risk jurisdiction
No nexus to a comprehensively sanctioned jurisdiction identified

adverse_media.title: Adverse Media
items: Two moderate-severity articles alleging past procurement-conflict scrutiny; no charge or conviction found
No financial-crime conviction identified in searched corpus

pep_sanctions_screening.title: PEP & Sanctions Screening
items: Primary PEP confirmed (former senior government official)
Sanctions screening: no true match; one adverse-media proximity flag referred for corroboration

expected_activity.title: Expected Activity & Rationale
items: Expected: investment inflows/outflows, quarterly, USD 250k-1.5m range
Rationale consistent with disclosed source of funds and wealth

ongoing_monitoring_controls.title: Ongoing Monitoring & Controls
items: Proposed enhanced monitoring: 6-month review cadence, PEP re-screening, transaction thresholds tuned

edd_trigger_scope.title: EDD Trigger & Scope
edd_trigger_scope.note: Risk rating of record is carried for context; this package does not change it.

residual_risk_assessment.title: Residual Risk Assessment
residual_risk_assessment.note: Deterministic indicator to inform human adjudication; not a risk rating of record.

recommendation.title: Recommendation for Adjudication
recommendation.note: Residual risk assessed High on documented factors. Recommend senior-management adjudication with enhanced ongoing monitoring (6-month cadence) and specialist confirmation of ownership and adverse-media findings before any onboarding or retention decision. Recommendation only — not a decision, rating change, or filing.

approvals.title: Approvals & Sign-off
approvals.note: Draft is queued for adjudication; obtaining these approvals is the human step.

sources_citations.title: Sources & Citations
sources_citations.note: Every asserted evidence item is mapped to an approved source above.

standing_note_limitations.title: Standing Note / Limitations
standing_note_limitations.text: Draft EDD package for human adjudication only. This package records evidence, source citations, and a risk-based recommendation; it makes no onboarding, retention, exit, or risk-rating decision, files no report, writes no system of record, and has not been sent or submitted. Every regulated decision and filing remains with the authorized adjudicator.

standing_note: Draft EDD package for human adjudication only.
